name: Tomato Bread Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 large tomatoes, seeded and chopped fine
1 medium cucumber, seeded and chopped fine
1 cup fresh basil leaves, loosely packed
1 large loaf of white bread or French bread
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, combine the tomatoes, cucumber, and onion.
In a small bowl, combine the basil, olive oil, cider vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper. Pour over the vegetables and toss well.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving. Allow the salad to come to room temperature before slicing the bread into thick slices and lightly broiling under high heat until browned. Top with the salad and serve immediately.
Yield: 18 servings
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (with a 1-inch slice of white bread) equals 1/2 starch, 1 vegetable, 1 fat; also, 188 calories, 262 mg sodium, 0 cholesterol, 5 gm carbohydrates, 7 gm protein, and 7 gm fat.
